articles.title: How to get a billion passengers to fly in India
articles.summary: 📰 정부 관련 뉴스\n📢 How to get a billion passengers to fly in India...
articles.content: Mr Fareed Sheikh played it cool. “It’s my first job, and I won’t get many days off to take 22-hour train rides both ways. A flight saves time,” he told The Straits Times. From there, it would be an hour’s rail journey to Parbhani. “Now that I am taking my first flight, I believe there will be many more,” he said. That is what the government and airlines in India are banking on

articles.title: Yahoo Finance
articles.summary:
📰 정부, 취업, 금융 관련 뉴스
📢 Yahoo Finance
articles.content: Weak adherence by the biggest platforms could undermine the momentum of governments considering similar restrictions. eSafety Commissioner Julie Inman Grant said Meta's Facebook ‌and Instagram, Snapchat, TikTok ⁠and Google's YouTube had been flagged for potential non-compliance and the watchdog was gathering evidence for possible penalties

articles.title: Thief strikes Woodlands stall, grabs $1,000 worth of necklaces during owner's 5-minute toilet break
articles.summary:
📰 법률, 기술, 국제 관련 뉴스
📢 Thief strikes Woodlands stall, grabs $1,000 worth of necklaces during owner's 5-...
articles.content: When the owner returned some five minutes later and checked the inventory, the owner found that five silver necklaces, amounting to about $1,000, were missing, reported the Chinese daily. The owner then called the police and asked Ding for CCTV footage. @asiaone A 5-minute toilet break for a Woodlands stall owner turned from relief to heartbreak as a man...

articles.title: Police appeal for information on 19-year-old male last seen in Tampines
articles.summary:
📰 주택, 법률, 기술 관련 뉴스
📢 Police appeal for information on 19-year-old male last seen in Tampines
articles.content: The said address is part of a HDB precinct located across the road from Temasek Polytechnic. All information will be kept strictly confidential, the police said.
